name: TestCommonSubplanExtract
cases: select * from (select t1.a from t1, t2 where t1.a = t2.a and t1.b > 10) x, (select t1.a from t1, t2 where t1.a = t2.a and t1.b > 10) y where x.a = y.a
select * from (select t1.a from t1, t2 where t1.a = t2.a) a, (select t1.a from t1, t2 where t1.a = t2.a) b, (select t1.a from t1, t2 where t1.a = t2.a) c where a.a = b.a and b.a = c.a
select * from (select x1.a from t1 x1, t1 x2 where x1.a = x2.a) a, (select x1.a from t1 x1, t1 x2 where x1.a = x2.a) b where a.a = b.a
select * from t1, t2 where t1.a = t2.a
select * from (select t1.a from t1, t2 where t1.a = t2.a) x, (select t1.a from t1, t2 where t1.a = t2.b) y where x.a = y.a
select * from (select t1.a from t1, t2 where t1.a = t2.a and t1.b > 10) x, (select t1.a from t1, t2 where t1.a = t2.a and t1.b > 20) y where x.a = y.a
select * from (select t1.a from t1 left join t2 on t1.a = t2.a) x, (select t1.a from t1 left join t2 on t1.a = t2.a) y where x.a = y.a
select * from (select t1.a from t1, t2 where t1.a = t2.a and t1.b > rand()) x, (select t1.a from t1, t2 where t1.a = t2.a and t1.b > rand()) y where x.a = y.a
select * from (select t1.a from t1, t2 where t1.a = t2.a) x, (select t1.a from t1, t3 where t1.a = t3.a) y where x.a = y.a
select * from (select x1.a from t1 x1, t1 x2 where x1.a = x2.a) a, (select y1.a from t1 y1, t1 y2 where y1.a = y2.a) b where a.a = b.a
select * from (select t1.a from t1, t2 where t1.a = t2.a and t1.b > 10) x, (select t1.a from t1, t2 where t1.a = t2.a and t1.b > 10) y where x.a = y.a
